assertions.text: Channel Overview table with subscriber count, avg views, median views
Top 10 Videos table with 5+ rows, views/day, engagement
Performance tiers (Hit/Solid/Underperformer) with video names
3+ key insights with specific numbers
Content Saturation Score 1-5 with topic groupings
3 SEO Problems with data but NO fixes
No title rewrites or suggested rewrites
No description template
No keyword opportunities or competitor benchmarking
Teaser/CTA box advertising full audit
Projected impact headline number
Upload strategy headline without specific recommended pace

notes: Baseline used WebSearch instead of yt-dlp — produced a journalistic report with no actual video data

Absence assertions (no fixes leaked) passed for both — but for different reasons: skill deliberately withheld, baseline simply didn't have the data to generate fixes
